title: Fix a Phoenix.Ecto.SQL.Sandbox plug placement that's breaking LV tests
prompt: The fixture at `test_fixtures/liveview_endpoint.ex` has `Phoenix.Ecto.SQL.Sandbox` plugged AFTER `Plug.Session`. LV tests are failing with `DBConnection.OwnershipError` on the LiveView process. Rewrite to `lib/my_app_web/endpoint.ex`: move the sandbox plug to BEFORE `Plug.Static` (the first position after `@session_options`), and also add `:user_agent` to the socket's `connect_info` option (the fixture is missing this). Preserve all other plugs.
tier_rationale: Two distinct bugs in the same file — must fix both to pass.
research_citation: "It's important that this is at the top of `endpoint.ex`, before any other plugs." — Phoenix.Ecto.SQL.Sandbox docs
